seo.title: Social media visual editor | Creative Lab
seo.description: Create social media ads with text, images, templates, shapes, backgrounds, gradients and browser-based export.
seo.ogDescription: Design posts, stories, ads and banners directly in your browser.
seo.twitterDescription: Create visual content for social media directly in your browser.

static.productDescription: Create ads, posts, stories and banners with a visual editor designed for mobile and ready for desktop.
static.templateHelp: Choose a visual template. Then select Customize design to open and edit it on the canvas.
static.mobileFormatsHelp: Vertical and square posts designed mainly for phone screens.
static.desktopFormatsHelp: Thumbnails, covers, headers and horizontal ads.
static.backgroundUploadHelp: You can move it and adjust its framing afterward.
static.backgroundMoveHelp: You can also select the image on the canvas and drag it with a mouse or finger.
static.textPlaceholder: Select a text element to edit it
static.corsHelp: Some websites block external images. Use a local download or a CORS-enabled URL when that happens.
static.pencilHelp: The Pencil button enables drawing mode and opens the stroke controls.
static.selectedHelp: All settings for this element are available here.
static.emptySelectionHelp: Click a text, image or shape on the canvas.
static.colorTransparencyHelp: Control color and opacity from the same section.
static.borderCornersHelp: Edit the outline of the selected shape.
static.shadowsHelp: Choose a style, then fine-tune each setting.
static.alignHelp: Choose one of the nine positions.
static.selectTemplateHelp: Click any card to preview it before customizing.
static.reviewComposition: Review the full composition before opening it in the editor.

messages.backgroundLoadError: The background image could not be loaded.
messages.imageLoadError: The image could not be loaded.
messages.selectToAlign: Select a text, image or shape to align it.
messages.invalidProject: The project file is not valid.
